{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Phantom Islands
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|There are thirteen [[Phantom Islands]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Phantom Islands]] is a location outside [[Moongrave]] that [[Mercy's mother]] created for [[Charity]]’s training.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
